nodes.label: GET Score (Genetic-Expression-Target Composite)
nodes.rationale: Composite scoring: 50% genetic, 25% expression, 25% tractability. Balances disease genetic evidence with actionable target properties to prioritize druggable genes.

nodes.label: Semantic Disease Name Correction Fallback
nodes.rationale: Uses NVIDIA or Gemini LLM to normalize misspelled or imprecise disease query terms before retrying Open Targets search, improving recall for user typos.

nodes.label: WINNER Algorithm (Nguyen T et al. 2022, Frontiers in Big Data)
nodes.rationale: Network-based gene prioritization using weighted PPI degree-based initial scoring and iterative propagation (sigma=0.85) over STRING interactions.
nodes.norm_label: winner algorithm (nguyen t et al. 2022, frontiers in big data)
